revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Skip to top and bottom/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Skip to top and bottom/styles.css}} The template isn't empty, it produces '''two arrow icons in the bottom right corner'''. ==Usage== Can be placed on [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate. This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometime also exist on user pages. This template produces 2 icons on the bottom-right corner. Clicking the rightmost one takes you to the bottom of the page while clicking on the left one takes you to the top of the page. To use this template just put the following anywhere on the page: {{tlx|Skip to top and bottom}} ==Example== {{Skip to top and bottom}} shall produce what you see in the bottom-right corner. Registered users can hide the icons by placing this in {{yourcss}}: #skip-to-top-button, #skip-to-bottom-button {display: none;} {{skip templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Skip to top and bottom/styles.css}} The template isn't empty, it produces '''two arrow icons in the bottom right corner'''. ==Usage== Can be placed on [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate. This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometime also exist on user pages. This template produces 2 icons on the bottom-right corner. Clicking the rightmost one takes you to the bottom of the page while clicking on the left one takes you to the top of the page. To use this template just put the following anywhere on the page: {{tlx|Skip to top and bottom}} ==Example== {{Skip to top and bottom}} shall produce what you see in the bottom-right corner. Registered users can hide the icons by placing this in {{yourcss}}: #skip-to-top-button, #skip-to-bottom-button {display: none;} {{skip templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Skip to top and bottom/styles.css}} The template isn't empty, it produces '''two arrow icons in the bottom right corner'''. ==Usage== Can be placed on [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate. This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometime also exist on user pages. This template produces 2 icons on the bottom-right corner. Clicking the rightmost one takes you to the bottom of the page while clicking on the left one takes you to the top of the page. To use this template just put the following anywhere on the page: {{tlx|Skip to top and bottom}} ==Example== {{Skip to top and bottom}} shall produce what you see in the bottom-right corner. Registered users can hide the icons by placing this in {{yourcss}}: #skip-to-top-button, #skip-to-bottom-button {display: none;} {{skip templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Help namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Skip to top and bottom/styles.css}} The template isn't empty, it produces '''two arrow icons in the bottom right corner'''. ==Usage== Can be placed on [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate. This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometime also exist on user pages. This template produces 2 icons on the bottom-right corner. Clicking the rightmost one takes you to the bottom of the page while clicking on the left one takes you to the top of the page. To use this template just put the following anywhere on the page: {{tlx|Skip to top and bottom}} ==Example== {{Skip to top and bottom}} shall produce what you see in the bottom-right corner. Registered users can hide the icons by placing this in {{yourcss}}: #skip-to-top-button, #skip-to-bottom-button {display: none;} {{skip templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Help namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
